R_100: 0,4,98,82,3,35,68,11,1,73,97,60,78,6,7,49,8,10,42,79,12,96,14,40,71,16,61,75,21,9,95,100,20,30,24,43,44,46,89,77,50,51,52,90,88,66,33,80,56,37,41,38,29,58,93,18,85,76,27,86,19,57,59,15,92,54,65,69,70,0|23,67,26,81,36,2,22,28,39,64,72,83,94,55,84,34,45,53,62,31,17,-1,13,47,25,91,32,99,87,48,74,5,63|1,4,5,6,9,10,11,17,29,34,36,37,38,41,42,47,49,51,52,64,67,-1,1,4,5,6,12,30,36,42,43,50,67|4,5,6,8,10,11,13,20,31,35,37,38,39,42,45,48,51,52,53,65,68,-1,4,5,6,9,13,32,37,43,45,52,68
